/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/TN: DANIEL WILLIAM MCKNIGHT/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1 AND #3/3000REIN/PAJ: 100DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/SA2: WALGREENS STORE AT 3601 CALIFORNIA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 17 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT & COURT LIAISON ROBERT ABAKAN - VIA ZOOM/X:DA SHEARER - VIA ZOOM/X:PER PAROLEE HIS TRUE NAME IS DANIEL MCKNIGHT WILLIAM/TN:DANIEL MCKNIGHT WILLIAM/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS/NB/X:PAROLEE INFORMED AS TO RESPONSIBILITY OF PAYMENT FOR SERVICES OF LEGAL COUNSEL & POSSIBLE FEE HEARING/X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/CONTD: PAROLE PREHEARING  CONFERENCE/   /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO APPEAR/
